# Release title

Patch: Fix mutable board reference leak in `Board.getFields()`

---

## Changelog

## [1.1.1] - 2026-05-11

### Fixed

- `Board.getFields()` now returns a shallow copy (`[...this.fields]`) instead of the internal mutable array reference, preventing external mutations and ensuring correct change detection when used with `useSyncExternalStore` or similar React hooks

[1.1.1]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1
